title: System Design from First Principles
description: A definitive system-design book that ramps from beginner to expert: DDIA-grade theory on an interview-ready spine, plus the production engineering behind real systems. 66 lessons across nine modules — foundations, data & distributed systems, infrastructure building blocks, patterns, fourteen end-to-end case studies with clickable C4 architecture (closing with a capstone: the platform serving the book itself), production operations, and an interview playbook. Every claim sourced, every diagram rendered.
